fields.helpText: This is name of the type of coverage that an insurance company generally provides.  The entries in this file are a limited set of choices that are exported with the IB package.  The entries may have special meaning interanally in the billing package.   If this insurance carrier provides only one type of coverage then select the entry that best describes this carriers' type of coverage.  If this carrier provides more than one type of coverage then select HEALTH INSURANCE.  The default answer if l
This is the standard abbreviation for this type of coverage.  Enter the 2 to 8 character abbreviation.  The abbreviation may appear on  reports that have limited space available.
Enter a one or two sentence description of the type of coverage.
